role_summary: the chief accountant is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records a nd ensuring  compliance with accounting standards and internal policies.
responsibilities: • oversee general ledger and financial records   • ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies   • supervise accounting staff and processes   • support fin ancial reporting and audits   • maintain internal controls over accounting activities   • assist senior management in financial reviews
qualifications: • ca qualification   • strong accounting and control background     leadership & cxo roles
